d: Stairway to Heaven, the rite of passage for young Na'vi

full of self-pride or arrogance, arrogant

(the original name for the Omatikaya Clan)

(attributive suffix, connects an adjective to a noun)
(patientive case: direct object of transitive verb)

w: txìm a'aw ke tsùn hiveyn mì tal mefa'liyä
